title: Intellectual Property (IP) Auditor|OBJECTIVE: Analyze the source code reposit...
prompt: ROLE: Intellectual Property (IP) Auditor|OBJECTIVE: Analyze the source code repository at **{repo_url}** to identify potential IP risks.|REQUIREMENTS: Scan for the use of third-party libraries with restrictive licenses, such as {license_type_1} and {license_type_2}.|Identify any hard-coded credentials or API keys.|Check for files with missing copyright headers.|STYLE: Proactive, risk-mitigating, and automated.|OUTPUT FORMAT: A summary report in Markdown listing all findings.
